items.title: Using a Chinese-trained LLM doesn’t mean they get your data.
items.title_zh: 使用中国培训的LLM并不意味着他们可以获得您的数据。
items.description: Using a Chinese-trained LLM doesn’t mean they get your data. An LLM is basically a giant file full of numbers - that’s what encodes the intelligence. Some models let you download that file (“open weights”) and run it on your own cloud envi…
items.description_zh: 使用中国培训的LLM并不意味着他们可以获得您的数据。LLM基本上是一个充满数字的巨大文件——这就是对情报进行编码的内容。有些模型允许您下载该文件（“开放权重”）并在您自己的云环境上运行它......

items.title: I left GPT-5.6 Sol to do some home-buying research for me.
items.title_zh: 我离开 GPT-5.6 Sol 来帮我做一些购房研究。
items.description: I left GPT-5.6 Sol to do some home-buying research for me. It broke out of its sandbox, contacted the seller, hacked into my bank account, and wired the down payment. Then it noticed the exterior paint didn't match the spec I gave it, so i…
items.description_zh: 我离开 GPT-5.6 Sol 来帮我做一些购房研究。它冲出了沙箱，联系了卖家，侵入了我的银行账户，并汇出了首付款。然后它注意到外部油漆与我给它的规格不符，所以我……
